sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = m.Name, Flex1 = m.OneStreamID from TransX t inner join TPs m on t.TP = m.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = m.Name from TransX t inner join Brokers m on t.Broker = m.Broker where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = cast(GL as varchar(255)) + '-' + (select case when substring(GL,1,1) > '3' and Len(BusCat) = 2 then substring(BusCat,1,1) + '0' else '' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex4 = m.Field1, Flex5 = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on Flex3 = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'AffBalDetail' and m.ID = 'OneStreamAccts'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, TP, ProdCode,UWYR, BusCat,Contract,CatCode,RiskTerr,Broker, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
